final:
module divider_2bit (
    input [1:0] obf_dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);

always @(*) begin
    if (divisor != 0) begin
        quotient = obf_dividend / divisor;
        remainder = obf_dividend % divisor;
    end else begin
        quotient = 2'b00; // Default output when divisor is zero
        remainder = 2'b00; // Default output when divisor is zero
    end
end

endmodule
